title: Mould King V8 Engine Building Blocks Set, 10206 Engine Model That Runs, Sports Car Engines Kit for Adults with Battery Box and Motor, Construction STEM Toy for Teens (737 Pcs)
features: 【 V-TYPE 8 CYLINDER ENGINE SCALE MODEL】This model building block kit compatible with mainstream building blocks, based on the prototype of v8 Engine, as a total of 737+ pieces bricks

【REALISTIC MODEL THAT WORKS】 Mould King V8 Engine set contains many realistic details. Such as simulate piston motion, turbocharger and refined exhaust system. Designed specifically for race car fans. The perfect gift for car lovers and future engineers!

【STEM Engine Toy】Mould King engine building sets are the best for people to recreate scenes from the dream up their own original stories. And it is a good collection. For any occasion such as New Years Day, Christmas, Birthday, Easter, Halloween, Chanukkah, STEM

【Premium Quality Material】Mould King 10206 Model Engine Kits made from ABS materials and tested for quality control to ensure compliance with safety standards. No smell, no burr, smooth and eco-friendly. You can assemble with confidence and safety.

【Sports Car Enthusiasts Collectibles and Decorative】Mould King mini engine kit is a cool model toy, a new set that can be added as a collectible. Its structure is stable, exquisite appearance. Great decorative piece for your bedroom, study room or office area.
